description: React component UploadCsvModal for uploading and previewing CSV claims files, including parsing logic with PapaParse and interactions with backend API for claim uploads.

methods.name: UploadCsvModal({ isOpen, onClose, onUploaded })
methods.description: React functional component for uploading CSV files, displaying a preview, and handling submission.

methods.name: parsePreview
methods.description: Asynchronously parses the selected CSV file to generate a preview of first 5 rows.

methods.name: onPickFile
methods.description: Handles file input change, sets file state, and triggers preview parsing.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Uploads the selected CSV file to backend via API, handles success/error states.

ctags.name: UploadCsvModal
ctags.pattern: /^export default function UploadCsvModal({ isOpen, onClose, onUploaded }) {$/
